DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrea Laiacona, Esq. of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, 510-337-1001 for defendant and moving party San Francisco Police Officer's Assoc.
Edward Marc Fishman, Esq., 707-823-8782 for plaintiff and opposing party Andrew Cohen

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its modified ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICERS' ASSOCIATION DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 AND 3. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 AND 4, 15 DAYS TO ANSWER. A UNION CAN UNDERTAKE A CONTRACTUAL OBLIGATION, BUT BY DOING SO, IT DOES NOT SUBJECT ITSELF TO A TORT CLAIM FOR A BREACH OF A GOOD FAITH COVENANT. Defendant's counsel will submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB/X-AB)
